title: TelePastries
description: Pastries that teleport players to other dimensions
body:
This mod adds pastries allowing you to travel through dimensions.

If you've played Skyblock modpacks in the past you might've used similar methods of dimensional transport.
This mod currently adds cakes to travel to the Overworld, end and the nether.

This mod also has compatability for the Twilight forest, The lost cities and The Hunting Dimension.

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco

  -ShyNieke
